reviews.comment:
No tienen gasolina para nosotros argentinos.
Es nuestra la volvimos comprar pero hay q ir a la Shell.

(Translated by Google)
They don't have gasoline for us Argentinians.
It's ours, we bought it again, but we have to go to Shell.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCaDhlcnhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de las chicas (todas) tanto turno mañana como el tarde. Hace 14 años que voy y es realmente limpio y excelente en todo el sentido de la palabra .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from all the staff, both morning and afternoon shifts. I've been going for 14 years and it's truly clean and excellent in every sense of the word.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNjctZlF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena toda la atención, en especial las chicas que están en el servi shop.

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent, especially from the girls in the service shop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCcTg3OEJBEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) I was refused service because I am a foreigner, even though I explained that I only needed a few liters of fuel to continue my visit to the city.

(Original)
Não fui atendido por ser estrangeiro, mesmo falando que precisava somente de poucos litros de combustível para continuar a minha visita a cidade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCaTVYVl9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy malo. No tienen la App. Siempre sin sistema. Largas colas. terrorífico.

(Translated by Google)
Very bad. They don't have an app. The system is always down. Long queues. Terrible.
